raw:
**SCENE ANALYSIS - A white bowl sits on a metallic surface, containing a single red apple. The apple is a rigid object with a smooth surface, located within the bowl. STRATEGY - First, reach into the bowl to grasp the apple. Since the apple is the only object in the bowl, it can be directly grasped without needing to push or pull other items. The task is straightforward as there are no other objects to interfere. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1: Reach into the bowl to access the apple. Step 2: Grasp the apple directly from the bowl. Step 3: Transport the apple to a destination (not specified, but assumed to be outside the bowl). Step 4: Place the apple at the destination.**
Goal: any_in(apple, bowl); stable(apple)
Scene: white_bowl, apple, metallic_surface
Step 1: reach(white_bowl)
  affordance_region: the rim of the white bowl
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, white_bowl, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, white_bowl) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(apple)
  affordance_region: the body of the red apple
  contact: holding(apple) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(apple)
Step 3: transport(apple -> outside_bowl)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the metallic surface outside the bowl
  spatial: above(apple, outside_bowl, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(apple)
  done_when: above(apple, outside_bowl, 0.05)
Step 4: place(apple -> outside_bowl)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the metallic surface outside the bowl
  contact: surface_contact(apple, outside_bowl) [completion]; released(apple) [completion]
  pose: stable(apple) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(apple, outside_bowl) AND released(apple)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the rim of the white bowl
the body of the red apple
an empty area on the metallic surface outside the bowl
an empty area on the metallic surface outside the bowl
